highlightedText: You are a member of a space crew originally scheduled to rendezvous with another ship on the lighted surface of the moon. However, due to mechanical difficulties, your ship was forced to land at a spot some 200 miles (about 321 km) from the rendezvous point. During reentry and landing, much of the equipment aboard was damaged and, since survival depends on reaching the mother ship, the most critical items available must be chosen for the 200-mile trip.

key_list: picious that you come up with those specifit items.

text: It's suspicious that you come up with those specifit items.

highlightedText:
Box of matches
	Food concentrate
	50 feet of nylon rope
	Parachute silk (降落伞布) 
	Portable heating unit
	Two .45 caliber pistols (.45口径手枪)
	One case of dehydrated milk (一箱脱水牛奶)
	Two 100 lb. tanks of oxygen (2个100磅氧气瓶)
	Stellar map
	Self-inflating life raft
	Magnetic compass
	20 liters of water
	Signal flares
	First aid kit, including injection needle
	Solar-powered FM receiver-transmitter
